item.title: SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple [Security]
item.itunes:title: SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple [Security]
item.itunes:author: ssh-mitm
item.itunes:summary:
SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple
(Security)
ssh man-in-the-middle (ssh-mitm) server for security audits supporting publickey authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple
(Security)
ssh man-in-the-middle (ssh-mitm) server for security audits supporting publickey authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple
(Security)
ssh man-in-the-middle (ssh-mitm) server for security audits supporting publickey authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]

item.title: How to Recover Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Recover Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
How to Recover Files Mac
(Utilities)
Highly innovative digital camera data recovery application for Mac operating system effectively retrieves overall fortuitously formatted data of each major kind of image extensions such as jpg, wmf, emf, gif, jpg, avi, midi and jpeg etc. Apple Macintosh OS X based data recovery software smoothly salvages absent files from some incidents such as accidental deletion, improper device handling, bad sector in disk, battery failure, software or hardware malfunctioning, formatted/reformatted memory cards, logical errors in memory cards of digital camera, unexpectedly virus or worm infection etc. Resourceful data retrieval utility for Apple Macintosh operating system brings back missing data through various chief manufacturer companies of digital cameras for example Konica, LG Electronics, Canon, Fuji-Film, Casio, HP, Kodak, Nikon, Olympus, Samsung, Sony and many more. Creative digital camera data revival application for Apple Mac operating system salvages misplaced data from different kinds of digital camera like novelty camera, point/shoot camera, professional camera, bridge camera, prosumer digital camera, digital video camera, speciality camera and other types of digital camera. Features:-* Innovative digital camera data recovery utility for Mac supports friendly graphical user interface consequently supportive for learner users to effortlessly work on the data revival tool.* Simple to use how to recover files application for Apple Macintosh OS X provides unique feature of previewing facility of intended file for user before than the actual data retrieval.* Elegant digital camera recovery software for Apple Macintosh operating system does not demand any added hardware or software installation for salvaging vanished data.* Consistent Macintosh OS based data revival program utilizes different advanced or standard searching algorithms to bring back images, video files and other vital recorded clippings.

[read more]

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
How to Recover Files Mac
(Utilities)
Highly innovative digital camera data recovery application for Mac operating system effectively retrieves overall fortuitously formatted data of each major kind of image extensions such as jpg, wmf, emf, gif, jpg, avi, midi and jpeg etc. Apple Macintosh OS X based data recovery software smoothly salvages absent files from some incidents such as accidental deletion, improper device handling, bad sector in disk, battery failure, software or hardware malfunctioning, formatted/reformatted memory cards, logical errors in memory cards of digital camera, unexpectedly virus or worm infection etc. Resourceful data retrieval utility for Apple Macintosh operating system brings back missing data through various chief manufacturer companies of digital cameras for example Konica, LG Electronics, Canon, Fuji-Film, Casio, HP, Kodak, Nikon, Olympus, Samsung, Sony and many more. Creative digital camera data revival application for Apple Mac operating system salvages misplaced data from different kinds of digital camera like novelty camera, point/shoot camera, professional camera, bridge camera, prosumer digital camera, digital video camera, speciality camera and other types of digital camera. item.title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:author: leillo1975
item.itunes:summary:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

[read more]
item.description:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

item.title: Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

[read more]

Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt5 graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

item.title: Restore Digital Camera Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Digital Camera Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Digital Camera Tool
(Utilities)
Digital camera data retrieval program is easy-to-use and non destructive data recovery tool which is used to restore or repair your deleted, missing files and folders from digital camera device even drive is corrupted message is displayed on your desktop, laptop computer. Digital camera image backup application is an advance software which can quickly restore formatted, corrupted data including jpg, gif, bmp, jpeg, riff, mpeg, wav, tif, avi, midi, png and other file formats. Digital camera file salvage utility provides comprehensive solution that recovers lost, erased digital pictures, photographs, audio video clips, music, images, snaps from damaged digital camera device. Digital camera picture rescue software can easily restore and retrieve deleted important files, folders from formatted digital camera storage media including memory card, multimedia card, xD card, sD card, compact flash card and mmc card etc. Digital camera data recovery tool recovers various types of digital camera like compact flash digital camera, line scan camera, digital video camera, point and shoot camera. Digital camera file salvage utility easily executes under windows OS including windows 11, windows 10, 7, 8, Vista, etc.Features:*Digital camera data backup software securely restores all deleted, missing photo file format from corrupted digital camera.*Digital camera image recovery application recovers inaccessible digital pictures, music collection, photographs from multimedia card of digital camera device.*Digital camera photo salvage program helps you to retrieve important files and folders which fully inaccessible.*Digital camera file retrieval utility is capable to restore all branded digital camera device including HP, Toshiba, Panasonic, Acer, Sony, Samsung and LG.

[read more]
item.description:
Restore Digital Camera Tool
(Utilities)
Digital camera data retrieval program is easy-to-use and non destructive data recovery tool which is used to restore or repair your deleted, missing files and folders from digital camera device even drive is corrupted message is displayed on your desktop, laptop computer. Digital camera image backup application is an advance software which can quickly restore formatted, corrupted data including jpg, gif, bmp, jpeg, riff, mpeg, wav, tif, avi, midi, png and other file formats. Digital camera file salvage utility provides comprehensive solution that recovers lost, erased digital pictures, photographs, audio video clips, music, images, snaps from damaged digital camera device. Digital camera picture rescue software can easily restore and retrieve deleted important files, folders from formatted digital camera storage media including memory card, multimedia card, xD card, sD card, compact flash card and mmc card etc. Digital camera data recovery tool recovers various types of digital camera like compact flash digital camera, line scan camera, digital video camera, point and shoot camera. Digital camera file salvage utility easily executes under windows OS including windows 11, windows 10, 7, 8, Vista, etc.Features:*Digital camera data backup software securely restores all deleted, missing photo file format from corrupted digital camera.*Digital camera image recovery application recovers inaccessible digital pictures, music collection, photographs from multimedia card of digital camera device.*Digital camera photo salvage program helps you to retrieve important files and folders which fully inaccessible.*Digital camera file retrieval utility is capable to restore all branded digital camera device including HP, Toshiba, Panasonic, Acer, Sony, Samsung and LG.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Restore Digital Camera Tool
(Utilities)
Digital camera data retrieval program is easy-to-use and non destructive data recovery tool which is used to restore or repair your deleted, missing files and folders from digital camera device even drive is corrupted message is displayed on your desktop, laptop computer. Digital camera image backup application is an advance software which can quickly restore formatted, corrupted data including jpg, gif, bmp, jpeg, riff, mpeg, wav, tif, avi, midi, png and other file formats. Digital camera file salvage utility provides comprehensive solution that recovers lost, erased digital pictures, photographs, audio video clips, music, images, snaps from damaged digital camera device. Digital camera picture rescue software can easily restore and retrieve deleted important files, folders from formatted digital camera storage media including memory card, multimedia card, xD card, sD card, compact flash card and mmc card etc. Digital camera data recovery tool recovers various types of digital camera like compact flash digital camera, line scan camera, digital video camera, point and shoot camera. Digital camera file salvage utility easily executes under windows OS including windows 11, windows 10, 7, 8, Vista, etc.Features:*Digital camera data backup software securely restores all deleted, missing photo file format from corrupted digital camera.*Digital camera image recovery application recovers inaccessible digital pictures, music collection, photographs from multimedia card of digital camera device.*Digital camera photo salvage program helps you to retrieve important files and folders which fully inaccessible.*Digital camera file retrieval utility is capable to restore all branded digital camera device including HP, Toshiba, Panasonic, Acer, Sony, Samsung and LG.

item.title: File Restoration Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: File Restoration Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
File Restoration Program
(Utilities)
Advanced file NTFS file recovery program provides option to recover and revive unlimited eliminated text data files from major windows operating system. Easily recover file software is specially designed to recover and restore audio, video, corrupted image files, partitioned disk drives important text data, erased project folders and other precious information. Easy to operate file restoration application offers most feasible solution to recapture entire damaged and corrupted data files. Professional File Recovery Software helps to retrieve missing data files in major data loss situations including system crash, software hardware malfunction, corrupted USB drives, internet virus, improper device handling and other data loss situations. Time saving file restore system revives erased and destroyed data from hard disk drive supported by major NTFS file systems. Software is fully able to recover and retrieve corrupted music tracks, videos, wallpapers of different file format. Software offers advanced technique to recapture deleted pdf files, windows applications. Amazing file recovery program is useful for different industries and organizations to revive lost deleted text files supported by all hard disk drives of different capacitates. Best file recovery system offers interactive graphical user interface to salvage entire eliminated data files. Most efficient File recovery Software helps professional as well as beginners to recover lost deleted data items. To take a trial of File Recovery Software, download application from site www.filerecoverysoftware.biz. Important Features: * File restoration application provides facility to recapture deleted data files from formatted USB drives.* Time saving file recovery software has ability to view recovered files before their final recovery from your laptop.* Most promising file restoration tool is fully compatible to all Microsoft windows operating system platforms.

[read more]
